products_list.name: 21k Gold Heritage Choker
products_list.description:
Description: Elevate your style with the bold elegance of our 21k gold chokers. Designed to sit beautifully high on the neck, each choker is crafted from solid, high-purity 21k yellow gold for a rich, warm, and radiant luster. Each piece features a built-in extension chain, making the length fully adjustable for a custom, comfortable fit on any neck size. Perfect for layering with longer necklaces or wearing standalone as a striking statement of luxury and cultural heritage.

Material: 21k Solid Yellow Gold
Length: Fully adjustable (features integrated adjustment rings/extension chain for a custom fit).
Included Items: Please refer to the product image for the exact matching items included in this set.
Craftsmanship: High-polish finish with hand-finished filigree or mesh detailing.
Occasion: Perfect for layering, formal celebrations, bridal wear, and evening styling.
